fixture_notice: SYNTHETIC-DRY-RUN NON-EVIDENTIARY: boundary constructions adapted from the candidate comparison; no outcome is empirical evidence.

cases.construction: The unchanged reminder 'Call the clinic at 09:00' is queried after completion to reconstruct what happened.
cases.organization_k_commitment: Retain the PROSPECTIVE series; represent episodic use through a new or derived EPISODIC series.
cases.organization_r_commitment: Allow the same object version to play PROSPECTIVE before completion and EPISODIC afterward under different contexts.
cases.distinguishing_dimension: Whether context-only role change requires identity multiplication.

cases.construction: One signed object contains recipe steps and the story of where the recipe was learned.
cases.organization_k_commitment: Choose one primary kind or split PROCEDURAL and EPISODIC series while retaining provenance consequences.
cases.organization_r_commitment: Retain one object and record PROCEDURAL or EPISODIC roles for the applicable contexts.
cases.distinguishing_dimension: Whether mixed functional content must be split or subordinated.

cases.construction: The general claim 'The office closes at 17:00' was learned during a visit, and a later query asks where that belief came from.
cases.organization_k_commitment: Keep the primary SEMANTIC series; represent the source episode as provenance or a separate series.
cases.organization_r_commitment: Allow SEMANTIC and EPISODIC roles for the same object in different query contexts.
cases.distinguishing_dimension: Whether source-sensitive recall changes functional membership.

cases.construction: A durable policy object is loaded into a bounded active task.
cases.organization_k_commitment: Retain primary PROCEDURAL kind and add a non-kind WORKING availability tier.
cases.organization_r_commitment: Record simultaneous PROCEDURAL and WORKING contextual roles.
cases.distinguishing_dimension: Whether WORKING is an availability tier or a peer functional role.
